column1: # MineGit legacy (1.8 numeric id+meta) -> flattened BlockState mapping table.
#   blockId, meta : 1.8 numeric ids (ints). meta is the data value (0-15).
#   flattenedId   : namespaced 1.13+ block id, e.g. minecraft:stone.
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored. This is the COMMON-blocks
# subset only; the full ~4000-entry table is a deferred data-fill follow-up.
